name: components/chart
description: A data-visualization wrapper built on top of @unovis that provides theme-aware chart primitives including ChartContainer, ChartTooltip, ChartLegend, ChartCrosshair, and area/line/bar primitives. Supports light/dark CSS variable theming via ChartStyle, responsive single and XY containers, and automatic tooltip/legend composition. Designed for dashboards and analytics pages that need consistent color tokens with the rest of the shadcn-solid design system.
useCases: Dashboard metric cards displaying revenue trends over time with area or line charts
Analytics pages showing user-activity bar charts segmented by device or channel
Sales reports combining multiple chart types (line + bar) in a single XY container
Health or IoT monitoring dashboards rendering real-time streaming data with crosshair tooltips
usage: import { ChartContainer, ChartTooltip, ChartLegend, ChartCrosshair, ChartStyle } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/chart"
